title: bouteloua oligostachya
intro: Bouteloua oligostachya, also known as blue grama grass, is a perennial grass native to North America, specifically the Great Plains region. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, exhibiting medicinal properties such as anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of blue grama grass include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and act as a natural antiseptic. Herbal preparations of Bouteloua oligostachya can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
